parameters.name: numtrials
parameters.description: Number of test trials (0 = unlimited, use timelimit instead). Clinical DSST uses 0 with timelimit=120

parameters.name: usefeedback
parameters.description: Show feedback on all trials (always shown during practice)

parameters.name: stimulustype
parameters.description: Type of stimulus: letter (A-Z), symbol (DSST symbols), or mixed

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Task direction: stimulus_to_digit (show stim, respond digit) or digit_to_stimulus (show digit, respond stim)

parameters.name: inputmethod
parameters.description: Input method: keyboard (numbers only), click (clickable buttons), or auto (smart default)

parameters.name: timelimit
parameters.description: Time limit in seconds (0 = no limit, use numtrials instead). Clinical DSST/WAIS uses 120 seconds (2 minutes)
